lessons.title: Welcome to Token Efficiency with Coding Agents
lessons.description: A brief introduction to the course, explaining what token efficiency means in the context of coding agents and how the 'Auto' mode in tools like GitHub Copilot and Cursor can save time and effort. You'll learn the basics and outcomes of this short course.

lessons.title: How Token Usage Works in Coding Agents
lessons.description: Understand the concept of token usage in coding agents, how tokens are consumed during code generation, and why managing them is crucial for cost-effective and efficient development with tools like GitHub Copilot and Cursor.

lessons.title: Token Efficiency Best Practices
lessons.description: Learn best practices for token efficiency, including why using the most powerful model isn’t always ideal. Understand how to balance performance and cost when working with coding agents for sustainable development.

lessons.title: Auto Mode Overview in Coding Agents
lessons.description: Get an overview of 'Auto' mode in coding agents, exploring how it enhances efficiency by automating suggestions and reducing token waste compared to manual input methods.

lessons.title: Using Auto Mode in GitHub Copilot
lessons.description: Practice using 'Auto' mode specifically in GitHub Copilot with a guided coding task. Learn tips to maximize its efficiency and minimize token usage during real-world coding scenarios.

lessons.title: Using Auto Mode in Cursor
lessons.description: Engage in a hands-on task to use 'Auto' mode in Cursor. Discover how to leverage its automation features for efficient code generation while keeping token consumption low.

lessons.title: why auto mode is useful in code development

lessons.title: test your understanding of token efficiency
lessons.description: test your understanding of token efficiency

courseInfo.description: This course dives into the concept of token efficiency using coding agents like GitHub Copilot and Cursor. You'll explore why token efficiency matters for cost-effective and faster coding, and learn how the 'Auto' mode feature in these tools automates code suggestions to optimize token usage. Through hands-on exercises, you'll set up these tools, practice coding with 'Auto' mode, and compare its efficiency to manual prompting. Additionally, you'll gain insights into best practices for managing token usage and understand why relying on the most powerful models isn’t always ideal. Designed for beginners, this short 15-minute course equips you with practical skills to leverage coding agents effectively, saving time and resources in your development workflow. Join us to transform how you code with smarter, more efficient strategies!
courseInfo.title: Token Efficiency with Coding Agents: Mastering Auto Mode
